initial_request_score.label: fully_supported

evidence.quote: investigate the structural stability and dynamic property of the wild type p53TD tetramer and its cancer-related R337H mutant
The initial coordinate of WT-p53Tet was taken from the solution NMR structure (PDB ID: 2J0Z) and the R337H mutant was generated by replacing Arg (R) at position 337 with His (H) using Pymol.
aim of understanding how the cancer-related R337H mutation reduces the structural stability of the p53TD tetramer

initial_request_score.fix_suggestion: No changes needed; all fields are fully supported by the paper text.

evidence.quote: R337H mutant was generated by replacing Arg (R) at position 337 with His (H) using Pymol.
N- and C-termini of each protein were respectively capped by acetyl (CH3CO) and amino (NH2) groups
using the GROMACS-2018.3 software package in combination with Charmm36m force field.
Each MD simulation was run for 2 μs... Five independent all-atom explicit-solvent MD simulations were performed both for WT-p53Tet and R337H–p53Tet
A H-bond was considered to be formed if the distance... is <= 0.35 nm and the D–H···A angle is >= 150°.
RMSD value of R337H–p53Tet is larger (~0.34 nm) than that of WT-p53Tet (~0.26 nm)

evidence.quote: The secondary structure of the proteins was calculated using the Define Secondary Structure of Protein (DSSP) package.

evidence.quote: Conformations used for principal components analysis... free energy landscape constructed using the relation -RT ln P
